title: IIM Ahmedabad is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Lead)

jsonLd.title: IIM Ahmedabad is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
IIM Ahmedabad, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Subject Matter Expert for our Rajkot operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About IIM Ahmedabad:
IIM Ahmedabad is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Support students with special educational needs
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Annual performance appraisal
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Rajkot, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IIM Ahmedabad!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
